ksa_text: Skill in establishing cross-functional data governance coordination mechanisms, including governance processes that span business units, governance community engagement, issue resolution coordination, and organizational change management for governance adoption.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the skill contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('organizational change management'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch, not irrelevance); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
